title: timmia angustifolia
intro: Timmia angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved timmia, is a type of liverwort that belongs to the class Marchantiophyta, a group of non-vascular land plants. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Timmia angustifolia include its ability to aid in the treatment of liver and kidney diseases, as well as its potential to reduce blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Timmia angustifolia can be prepared as a tea or decoction, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine for various purposes, including the treatment of digestive issues and skin conditions.
